title: Report Rating
description: Every record in feedback/ratings.json. Mirrors the v2 dashboard's preferences.json export shape, extended with prompt/model versioning per ADR-007.

report_id.description: Either content/reports/<id>.md or a v2-dashboard inline item id (e.g. 'thutuc-xaydung'). Both forms are accepted during the markdown migration.

criteria.description: 1..5 Likert ratings on three editorial dimensions.

data_density.description: How much hard data / specifics vs. fluff.

insight_quality.description: How much the report changes the reader's view.

tags.description: Free-form tags chosen by user (e.g. 'buried lede', 'great context', 'missing context', 'too jargony').

rater.description: Optional rater identifier; default is the single human user.
